info.title: Minimal Overlay Test Spec
info.description: A minimal OpenAPI spec to test overlay handling of nullable, oneOf, anyOf, and array patterns.

get.description: Returns an object containing all test schemas as properties.

200.description: A response object containing all test schema patterns.

schema.description: Object containing all test schema patterns as properties.

arrayNull.description: Schema with a property of type [array, null].

anyOfStringNull.description: Schema with a property using anyOf: string, string (empty), or null.

anyOfArrayNull.description: Schema with a property using anyOf: array or null.

oneOfStringNull.description: Schema with a property using oneOf: string, string (empty), or null.

oneOfArrayNull.description: Schema with a property using oneOf: array or null.

ArrayNullPropertySchema.description: Object schema with a property of type [array, null] for overlay testing.

exampleArrayProperty.description: A property that can be an array of strings or null.

AnyOfStringNullPropertySchema.description: Object schema with a property using anyOf: string, string (empty), or null.

value.description: A value that can be a string (a|b|c), an empty string, or null.

AnyOfArrayNullPropertySchema.description: Object schema with a property using anyOf: array or null.

exampleArrayProperty.description: A value that can be an array of strings or null.

OneOfStringNullPropertySchema.description: Object schema with a property using oneOf: string, string (empty), or null.

exampleOneOfProperty.description: A value that can be a string (a|b|c), an empty string, or null.

OneOfArrayNullPropertySchema.description: Object schema with a property using oneOf: array or null.

exampleArrayProperty.description: A value that can be an array of strings or null.

TopLevelStringNull.description: A top-level schema that can be a string or null.
